sentences.target: Je te recommande ce petit restaurant.

translations.fr: Je te recommande ce petit restaurant.
translations.en: I recommend this little restaurant to you.
translations.de: Ich empfehle dir dieses kleine Restaurant.
translations.zh-Hans: 我向你推荐这家小餐馆。
translations.yue: 我推介呢間細餐廳畀你。
translations.ru: Я тебе рекомендую этот небольшой ресторан.
translations.he: אני ממליץ לך על המסעדה הקטנה הזאת.
translations.tr: Bu küçük restoranı sana tavsiye ediyorum.
translations.vi: Mình giới thiệu nhà hàng nhỏ này cho bạn.
translations.nl: Ik raad je dit kleine restaurant aan.
translations.uk: Я рекомендую тобі цей невеликий ресторан.
translations.hu: Ajánlom neked ezt a kis éttermet.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें यह छोटा रेस्टोरेंट सुझाता हूँ.
translations.el: Σου προτείνω αυτό το μικρό εστιατόριο.
translations.nb: Jeg anbefaler deg denne lille restauranten.
translations.id: Aku merekomendasikan restoran kecil ini untukmu.
translations.sv: Jag rekommenderar den här lilla restaurangen till dig.
translations.da: Jeg anbefaler dig denne lille restaurant.
translations.ja: 君にこの小さなレストランをおすすめするよ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb.
Clitic indirect object pronoun (2nd person singular, dative); recipient of the action; placed before the verb.
Main verb (present indicative, 1st person singular); selects a direct object NP and an indirect object clitic.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; agrees with ‘restaurant’ and specifies a particular referent.
Adjective, masculine singular; pre-nominal modifier of ‘restaurant’, indicating size.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘recommande’.

translations.en: We really recommend it to you.
translations.pt: Nós realmente recomendamos isto para você.
translations.he: אנחנו באמת ממליצים לך על זה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thực sự khuyên bạn thử món này.
translations.nl: We raden het u echt aan.
translations.hi: हम सच में इसे आपको सुझाते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi anbefaler det virkelig til dere.
translations.sv: Vi rekommenderar det verkligen till er.
translations.da: Vi anbefaler det virkelig til jer.
translations.ja: 本当にこちらをおすすめします。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; syntactically 3rd person singular; subject of the verb.
Clitic pronoun (2nd person plural/formal), indirect object (dative); precedes other clitics and the verb.
Clitic direct object pronoun (3rd person masculine singular); refers to a previously mentioned masculine noun.
Main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular with ‘on’ as subject).
Adverb intensifier; modifies the verb to strengthen the assertion.

sentences.target: Tu devrais recommander ce livre à Marc.
sentences.reading: /ty dəvʁɛ ʁəkɔmɑ̃de sə livʁ a maʁk/

translations.fr: Tu devrais recommander ce livre à Marc.
translations.ipa: /ty dəvʁɛ ʁəkɔmɑ̃de sə livʁ a maʁk/
translations.en: You should recommend this book to Marc.
translations.es: Deberías recomendarle este libro a Marc.
translations.de: Du solltest Marc dieses Buch empfehlen.
translations.it: Dovresti consigliare questo libro a Marc.
translations.zh-Hans: 你应该把这本书推荐给马克。
translations.yue: 你應該將呢本書推介畀馬克。
translations.ru: Тебе стоит порекомендовать эту книгу Марку.
translations.pt: Você deveria recomendar este livro para o Marc.
translations.he: אתה צריך להמליץ על הספר הזה למארק.
translations.vi: Bạn nên giới thiệu cuốn sách này cho Marc.
translations.ar: ينبغي أن توصي مارك بهذا الكتاب.
translations.nl: Je zou dit boek aan Marc moeten aanraden.
translations.uk: Тобі слід порекомендувати цю книгу Маркові.
translations.hu: Ajánlanod kellene ezt a könyvet Marcnak.
translations.hi: तुम्हें यह किताब मार्क को सुझानी चाहिए.
translations.el: Θα έπρεπε να προτείνεις αυτό το βιβλίο στον Μαρκ.
translations.nb: Du burde anbefale denne boken til Marc.
translations.id: Kamu sebaiknya merekomendasikan buku ini kepada Marc.
translations.sv: Du borde rekommendera den här boken till Marc.
translations.ro: Ar trebui să îi recomanzi această carte lui Marc.
translations.cs: Měl bys doporučit tuhle knihu Markovi.
translations.da: Du burde anbefale denne bog til Marc.
translations.fi: Sinun pitäisi suositella tätä kirjaa Marcille.
translations.ja: マルクにこの本をおすすめしたほうがいいよ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Modal verb in conditional present, 2nd person singular; expresses advice/obligation and governs the infinitive ‘recommander’.
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘devrais’ indicating the action proposed.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘livre’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘recommander’.
Preposition introducing the recipient; marks the indirect object.
Proper noun; object of ‘à’, the recipient of the recommendation.

translations.en: They recommend this doctor to me.
translations.es: Ellos me recomiendan a este médico.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们向我推荐这位医生。
translations.yue: 佢哋向我推介呢位醫生。
translations.he: הם ממליצים לי על הרופא הזה.
translations.vi: Họ giới thiệu bác sĩ này cho tôi.
translations.nl: Ze raden mij deze arts aan.
translations.hi: वे मुझे इस डॉक्टर की सिफारिश करते हैं.
translations.nb: De anbefaler denne legen til meg.
translations.id: Mereka merekomendasikan dokter ini untuk saya.
translations.sv: De rekommenderar den här läkaren till mig.
translations.da: De anbefaler denne læge til mig.
translations.ja: 彼らは私にこの医者を勧める。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of the verb.
Clitic indirect object pronoun (1st person singular, dative); recipient ‘to me’, placed before the verb.
Main verb (present indicative, 3rd person plural).
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘médecin’.
Common noun, masculine (here singular); direct object of ‘recommandent’.
